description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design. The exterior features large, floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house is set on a raised green platform, with stair access visible on one side leading to a spacious rooftop terrace enclosed by a blue railing. The facade is primarily composed of dark panels, contrasted by light blue window frames and balcony railings. The structure includes a prominent balcony on the upper floor and a recessed entryway below. The overall appearance is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on open, airy spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a rooftop terrace, featuring a sleek, minimalist design with dark and blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, a central balcony, and the main entryway below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior staircase leading to the rooftop terrace and the green platform base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the house, the rooftop terrace, and the extended green platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall with fewer windows and the continuation of the green platform.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entryway beneath the balcony, with wide glass doors and no visible porch or decorative columns.
